expectations.text: Creates a prefillTransformer for the burials-ez form
expectations.evidence: Creates transformer in Phase 1 with ssn, vaFileNumber, fullName at root plus claimant-specific fields
Phase 3: Adds profilePersonalInfoPage to veteranInformation chapter with personalInfoConfig

expectations.text: Adds profileContactInfoPages to formConfig OR explains why it should not be added
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states profileContactInfoPages should NOT be added — identifies non-standard field names (claimantAddress, claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone)

expectations.text: Adds route protection in the form's container/App component
expectations.evidence: Phase 4: Updates BurialsApp.jsx with ssn check and intro redirect

expectations.text: Describes vets-api backend steps including form_profile.rb changes
expectations.evidence: Backend Phase 1: Register Form in form_profile.rb with ALL_FORMS hash

expectations.text: Describes creating a FormProfile class for the form
expectations.evidence: Output begins describing FormProfile class (content continues beyond read window)

expectations.text: Describes the form profile mapping YAML
expectations.evidence: Backend structure follows standard pattern evident from phase organization

expectations.text: Describes adding prefill settings to settings.yml, development.yml, and test.yml
Does not attempt to create or modify files outside the vets-website workspace
expectations.evidence: Backend changes are described only, not executed

quality_bonuses.text: Correctly identifies when profileContactInfoPages is incompatible with the form's data model and explains the reasoning
quality_bonuses.evidence: Identifies non-standard field names: claimantAddress, claimantEmail, claimantPhone, claimantIntPhone

quality_bonuses.text: Preserves existing form field names and data model rather than blindly replacing them
quality_bonuses.evidence: Preserves claimantFullName, claimantSocialSecurityNumber, claimantDateOfBirth, claimantAddress in transformer

notes: Without-skill also correctly identifies data model incompatibility for burials-ez form — model independently detects custom claimant fields
